feature: Phase 2 — Rules-Correctness Fixes + Phase-1 Reviewer Follow-ups
notes: NOTE-1: P2-6 has one true red/green discriminator (open-cancel segfaults pre-fix); the other three GUI tests are behavioral contract-locks that coincide pre/post-fix in the harness scenario (transparently disclosed by the Tester). Adequate at feature level.
NOTE-2: H2 and F2-serialization remain intentionally deferred to the future save-format-hardening phase; recorded in doc/deferred-tasks.md, not gaps in this plan.
NOTE-3: resolveToHitModifier treats owned RH as always-operating per plan decision 2b-1 and the manual; noted for traceability only, not a defect.
follow_up_feature_requests: Persist the active defense across save/load (H2): extend FVehicle::save()/load() so the currently-raised defense survives a save/reload cycle; coordinate in a single save-format-hardening phase with a versioned wire-format bump.

Serialize FPlayer::m_destroyed (F2-serialization): extend FPlayer::save()/load() to persist the destroyed-ship list to back the optional Replacements rule; bundle with H2 behind the same format version bump.
security_judgment: Reasonable — all changes are local correctness/memory-safety/robustness with no attacker-controlled trust boundary; file dialogs read local user-chosen paths only.
